description: .NET version upgrade plan from .NET Framework 4.8 to .NET 10.0

tasks.reason: The user explicitly requested an upgrade to the latest LTS version. .NET Framework 4.8 is a legacy platform with no new feature development. Migrating to .NET 10.0 LTS ensures long-term support, improved performance, cross-platform compatibility, access to modern ASP.NET Core features, and continued security updates.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade ContosoUniversity from .NET Framework 4.8 to .NET 10.0. This includes: (1) converting the legacy non-SDK-style project file to SDK-style format and migrating from packages.config to PackageReference; (2) updating the target framework from net48 to net10.0; (3) migrating from ASP.NET MVC 5 (System.Web-based) to ASP.NET Core MVC, including controllers, routing, views, filters, and startup configuration (replacing Global.asax with Program.cs); (4) replacing Web.config-based configuration with appsettings.json and the Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration model; (5) updating all NuGet packages to versions compatible with .NET 10, including upgrading Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore from 3.1.x to a current stable release.
